title: FinnGen Integration
description: The FinnGen integration module connects Parthenon to the FinnGen biobank dataset, enabling researchers to leverage Finland's large-scale genomic and health registry data within the platform's standard analytical workflows. It provides access to OMOP-mapped FinnGen phenotypes, endpoint definitions, and linked genomic summary statistics.
tips: FinnGen endpoint definitions use a Finnish registry-specific coding system — review the endpoint documentation to confirm alignment with your phenotype of interest before building cohorts.
Linked genomic summary statistics from FinnGen can be used in conjunction with Parthenon's Genomics module for PheWAS and genetic association analyses.
Access to FinnGen data through Parthenon requires institutional data access agreements — confirm your organization's authorization status with your administrator before initiating analyses.
Use the Concept Mapping screen to crosswalk FinnGen ICD-based endpoints to OMOP standard concepts for use in cross-database network studies.
Cohorts derived from FinnGen data should note the Finnish population ancestry context when interpreting results intended for broader generalizability.
